name: agent-constellation
tagline: dispatch draws the line, collapse turns the star red

name: ascii-aquarium
tagline: An ASCII fish tank that gains a fish on every task.done. A moon rises at night.

name: chiptune-clock
tagline: A desk clock that tells the hour with an 8-bit bell.

name: chiptune-themes
tagline: Each event kind gets a theme; a successful deploy plays a fanfare.

name: collapse-arcade
tagline: High collapse-rate agents become enemies. Shooting one = a review.

name: collapse-siren
tagline: When collapse rate crosses a threshold, the terminal blares a dissonant siren.

name: commit-constellation
tagline: Commit authors become stars; the bigger the contribution, the brighter.

name: commit-symphony
tagline: Your git history becomes an 8-bit tune; AI co-authored commits ring an octave up.

name: cpu-diner
tagline: customers rush in when your CPU sweats

name: desk-weather
tagline: Your repo's health becomes desk weather; a dirty tree clouds over.

name: device-mirror
tagline: See the hardware before you buy it: a virtual M5Stack panel mirrors the HAL's DrawCommands

name: event-loom
tagline: Weaves every event on one bus into a live universal viewer.

name: focus-aquarium
tagline: A day's focus log swims out as a school of fish at night.

name: focus-forge
tagline: A pomodoro that isn't self-reported. Only measured focus swings the hammer.

name: focus-tally
tagline: What you did today stacks up as a terminal bar chart.

name: git-replay
tagline: Time-lapse playback of a repo's history, human and AI color-coded.

name: git-weather
tagline: High-churn days storm, quiet days stay clear.

name: pomodoro-forge
tagline: Mine ore by focusing, smelt it on commit - a blacksmith's pomodoro.

name: routing-radar
tagline: A radar surveying dispatch hit-rate with confidence bars.

name: routing-slot
tagline: Worker dispatch as a slot machine; the right fit hits the jackpot.

name: secretary-today
tagline: Today's priorities as lanes; blocked items sink in red.

name: ume-tamagotchi
tagline: Raise Umeko: she's happy when you post, sulks when things stall.
